THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAU, SANDY K. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DIXON, KIMBERLY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 536 MASON ST., #404, S.F., CA. 94102, STAYED UNTIL MAY-31-2004, PLAINTIFF TO KEEP $1110.00 SECURITY DEPOSIT AND INTEREST OF $380.73 TO COVER RENT. DEFENDANT AGREES TO PAY PLAINTIFF $200.00 IMMEDIATELY AND PAYMENT ARREARAGE BY PAYING PLAINTIFF PER PAYMENT SCHEDULE IN JUDGMENT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR TERMS REGARDING DEFAULT OF STIPULATION.
